author: thomreis
body:
#### PR description:

Add additional processes relevant for ECAL simulation and reconstruction developments to the existing ECAL development matrix workflows.

#### PR validation:

Run newly created workflows 34402.612, 34602.612, and 34602.633.

Backport of #51269 to be used for special productions in the next Phase 2 MC campaign.
title: Add additional processes to ECAL development matrix workflows - 200X
